programs.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programs.sub_title: Pete Buttigieg, Andy Serkis, Jon Stewart
programs.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests Pete Buttigieg, Andy Serkis & Late Show Home Shopping with Jon Stewart.

programs.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programs.desc: Join The Late Show host Stephen Colbert as he shares his views on a number of trending news updates and catches up with guests to engage in candid conversations.

programs.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programs.desc: The fashion industry is ruled by the Forrester family in Beverly Hills. But behind the glitz and glamor, the Forresters encounter many hardships, including divorces, alcoholism, and deaths.

programs.title: Family Feud
programs.desc: Steve Harvey assumes the hosting duties for this daytime game show in which five members of one family are pitted against five members of another family.

programs.title: Deal Or No Deal
programs.desc: Contestants must beat the Banker to win a prize of 100,000 dollars. With 22 sealed briefcases filled with varying amounts of cash, the player must decide whether to accept an offer from the Banker or stick with the unknown contents of their chosen briefcase.

programs.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programs.desc: Six contestants go head-to-head to survive the hot seat and win the cash. This is a game of strategy, skill, and survival.
